query: SELECT cg.id, cg.productId, cg.name, p.name as productName FROM complementGroups cg JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id WHERE c.establishmentId = 150004 AND (cg.name LIKE '%Sabor%' OR cg.name LIKE '%Sorvete%' OR cg.name LIKE '%Extra%') ORDER BY cg.name, cg.id;
